SET prompt_demanda TO $'''%texto_prompt%
minha demanda acaba aqui'''
WebAutomation.LaunchChrome.LaunchChrome Url: $'''https://chat.openai.com/''' WindowState: WebAutomation.BrowserWindowState.Maximized ClearCache: False ClearCookies: False WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60 Timeout: 60 PiPUserDataFolderMode: WebAutomation.PiPUserDataFolderModeEnum.AutomaticProfile BrowserInstance=> chat_gpt
IF (WebAutomation.IfWebPageContains.WebPageContainsText BrowserInstance: chat_gpt Text: $'''Agradecemos por experimentar o ChatGPT''') THEN
    MouseAndKeyboard.SendKeys.FocusAndSendKeys TextToSend: $'''{Tab}{Tab}{Tab}{Return}''' DelayBetweenKeystrokes: 100 SendTextAsHardwareKeys: False
    WebAutomation.Click.Click BrowserInstance: chat_gpt Control: appmask['Web Page \'https://chatgpt.com/\'']['Paragraph'] ClickType: WebAutomation.ClickType.LeftClick MouseClick: True WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60 MousePositionRelativeToElement: WebAutomation.RectangleEdgePoint.MiddleCenter OffsetX: 0 OffsetY: 0
END
Clipboard.SetText Text: prompt_demanda

WebAutomation.Click.Click BrowserInstance: chat_gpt Control: appmask['Web Page \'https://chatgpt.com/\'']['Paragraph 2'] ClickType: WebAutomation.ClickType.LeftClick MouseClick: True WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60 MousePositionRelativeToElement: WebAutomation.RectangleEdgePoint.MiddleCenter OffsetX: 0 OffsetY: 0
